mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_sales_order o LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON o.cust_cd = c.cust_cd

SELECT o.order_no, o.order_date, o.cust_cd, c.cust_nm, o.status, o.total_amt, o.remark, o.created_by, o.created_at FROM tb_sales_order o LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON o.cust_cd = c.cust_cd
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC, o.order_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT o.*, c.cust_nm FROM tb_sales_order o LEFT JOIN tb_customer c ON o.cust_cd = c.cust_cd WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_sales_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sales_order ( order_no, order_date, cust_cd, cust_nm, status, total_amt, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{order_no}, #{order_date}, #{cust_cd}, #{cust_nm}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), COALESCE(#{total_amt}, 0), #{remark}, #{created_by}, NOW(), #{updated_by}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sales_order SET order_date = #{order_date}, cust_cd = #{cust_cd}, cust_nm = #{cust_nm}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updated_by}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{order_no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_sales_order_item WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_sales_order_item ( order_no, seq, item_cd, item_nm, qty, unit_price, amount, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{order_no}, #{seq}, #{item_cd}, #{item_nm}, #{qty}, #{unit_price}, #{amount}, #{created_by}, NOW(), #{updated_by}, NOW() )
